Pictonico, a WarioWare like game from Nintendo that involves photos, is heading to mobile devices.

New PlayStation Plus Subscriptions Will Cost More

The cost of PlayStation Plus subscriptions is going up, with Sony blaming "ongoing market conditions" for the change.

The post New PlayStation Plus Subscriptions Will Cost More appeared first on Siliconera.
